record.field: <data> <!-- Remove healthprof from its current position (near end) --> <xpath expr="/tree/field[@name='healthprof']" position="replace"/> <!-- Insert healthprof after the first appointment_date field (=Fecha) --> <xpath expr="/tree/field[@name='appointment_date']" position="after"> <field name="healthprof" expand="1" width="300"/> </xpath> </data>
